text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a performance, we hear<n>students in the
crowd saying that<n>concerts are only for star
runners—for<n>those who earn their mics on the
track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon counters, arguing that<n>every runner
has emotions she<n>wants to convey to fans in her
own<n>voice, regardless of how she placed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why we're creating a space<n>just for
that—the pure expression of<n>gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Falcon's impassioned<n>plea, even
students who previously<n>showed no interest in
our project<n>begin to warm up to the idea of the
Grand Concert.
